description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white mesh and synthetic upper with beige and light gray overlays. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with a distinctive yellow-green 'CACTUS CORPORATION' label on the tongue. The midsole is white with a subtle yellow accent, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. Mesh panels and perforations are visible for breathability, while the laces are a light beige color, threaded through reinforced eyelets. Branding details are present on the heel and tongue, and the overall design suggests a modern, urban streetwear aesthetic.
description: A white and beige high-top sneaker with mesh panels, yellow-green branding, and a cushioned, modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded heel, mesh panel, and 'CACTUS' branding on the heel tab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swoosh-like logo, mesh and synthetic overlays, and the layered midsole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the lacing system, yellow-green 'CACTUS CORPORATION' tongue label, and toe perforations.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible mesh heel, side logo, and layered construction details.
attribute_logo: Yellow-green 'CACTUS CORPORATION' text on the tongue; raised 'CACTUS' text on the heel tab; swoosh-like logo on the side in white.
